_comment: Internal artifact manifest. Renders in /admin → Materials tab. To add a repo-tracked entry: drop the file in the repo, add a row here, commit + push. (Browser uploads via the admin UI go through /api/admin-materials and live in Supabase.)

categories.name: Strategy & Business
categories.description: Internal strategic docs · audits · benchmark assets

items.title: Roadmap — 1-week / 30-day / quarter punchlist
items.description: Prioritized backlog synthesized from all 4 audit docs. Every item has effort + source + definition-of-done. Single highest-leverage move: senior implementation manager hire (Q1).

items.title: Audit v2 — Consolidated changelog (commit-style summary across all 5 phases)
items.description: Walks through every file touched in the engagement, organized by phase. ~70 files, ~2,800 lines, 3 SQL migrations, 1 strategy deck, 139 Playwright tests. Useful as a release-notes artifact.

items.title: Business Strategy v2 — Slide deck
items.description: 16-slide PowerPoint: pricing tiers, 10-competitor matrix, SWOT, action plan, metrics dashboard, risk register.

items.title: Business Strategy v2 — PDF
items.description: Read-only PDF export of the strategy deck — for sharing without PowerPoint.

items.title: Business Strategy v2 — Markdown source
items.description: Full text version: 10 sections, complete competitor matrix, full SWOT, sequenced recommendations.

categories.name: Audits & Reviews
categories.description: Security · visual · mobile · performance audits — kept honest with v1/v2 history

items.title: Security Audit — v1 + v2
items.description: OWASP Top 10 review across 22 HTML pages and 31 API endpoints. v2 adds 5 Critical · 8 High · 12 Medium · 6 Low findings + ready-to-apply fix snippets.

items.title: Visual / UX Audit — v1 + v2
items.description: Nielsen heuristics + premium SaaS comparison. Tier A/B/C action plan. v2 covers protected pages (admin, dashboard, portal) + Lindy/Gumloop competitors.

items.title: Mobile Audit
items.description: iPhone 12 / 390×844 viewport pass across all customer pages. Critical /comparison fix shipped.

categories.name: Operations & Architecture
categories.description: Persistent rules · deploy guides · architecture docs — read these before changing anything

items.title: CLAUDE.md — Persistent rules for AI coworkers
items.description: Standards every AI/human contributor follows: tokens, fonts, CTA copy, pricing-everywhere rule, security headers, file-handling rules.

items.title: Client Portal — Plan & Architecture
items.description: Why the portal exists, what's in each phase, auth model (HMAC-signed URL tokens), data model for agents/runs/drafts.

items.title: Deploy Guide — PR 1.5 / 2 / 3 / 5
items.description: One-shot deploy checklist for the original audit batches. Vercel env, Supabase migrations, smoke test.

items.title: Deploy Guide — Stripe + Onboarding + Agents
items.description: Stripe setup, webhook config, onboarding bucket, env vars for the full-stack feature ships.

items.title: README — Project overview
items.description: Stack, repo layout, env-var matrix, run instructions, audit pointers, deploy steps.

categories.name: Design & Customer-facing Collateral
categories.description: Brand assets · design prompts · public-facing PDFs

items.title: Claude Design — Asset prompts
items.description: Paste-ready prompts for Claude Design: OG image, favicon, apple-touch-icon, pain illustrations, agent-UI mockup.

items.title: Ramped one-pager (PDF, customer-facing)
items.description: Public sales one-pager — used as a leave-behind after discovery calls.

items.title: Open Graph image (1200×630)
items.description: Social-share preview image — shows in LinkedIn / Slack / iMessage cards.

items.title: Open Graph image @2x (Retina)
items.description: Higher-resolution variant for crisp 4K previews.

items.title: Hero agent-UI screenshot (1280×720)
items.description: Embedded in homepage hero showcase — the static layer under the V2-B6 live overlay.

items.title: Email logo bars
items.description: Used in the dark-navy email header across booking confirmation, roadmap, weekly digest, reminders.

categories.name: Sales & Playbooks
categories.description: Talk tracks · objection handling · prospect materials — keep this in lockstep with the homepage

items.title: Sales Playbook v1 — Discovery call script
items.description: Opener · core pitch · concrete example · urgency · the offer · 4 objection responses. Numbers cited match /comparison + homepage — update in lockstep.
